classObjective: Apply parallel line theorems to solve real-world and geometric problems.
workedExamples: 12-9, Example 3 — Apply Parallel Line Theorems to Real-World Problems
warmUp: How are parallel line theorems used in construction and engineering?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: real-world parallel line applications; proofs with converses; geometric problem-solving with parallel line theorems
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice applying parallel line theorems to real-world and geometric contexts
independentPractice: Practice problems applying parallel line theorems to solve geometric and real-world problems
assessment: Exit ticket: use parallel line theorems to solve a geometric proof involving transversals and angle relationships
capReflection: What real-world measurements rely on parallel line properties?
